title: Mentor Guide — Day 16 — Platform Integration
coachingObjective: Help participants evolve their Blueprint and FEC — not restart — by connecting their venture to the AIA platform.

timing.preSession: Review Deck 01 Scenes 8–11 and Playbook Blueprint + FEC paths
timing.duringSession: Circulate during Blueprint and FEC workshop blocks
timing.postSession: Note who still frames AIA as employer vs platform

discussionQuestions: Does their Business Model reflect their Week 1–3 customer work?
Is Revenue Model specific or generic?
Can they explain platform integration in one sentence?
observationAreas: Emotional shift — pride in prior work vs anxiety about Week 4
coachingTips: Reinforce: Week 1–3 work remains valid — it evolves
Redirect product pitch energy toward business model design
warningSigns: Erasing Week 3 FEC foundation instead of extending it
Treating platform integration as 'joining AIA' instead of building on a platform
reflectionPrompts: How did platform integration change how you see your venture?
expectedOutcomes: Blueprint Business Model + Revenue Model updated
FEC Platform Integration, Revenue Engine, Agency Growth Strategy
